title: The Engineering Event in SF You Don't Want to Miss | Vector Space Day | June 11
summary: Vector Space Day is an engineering conference on June 11 in San Francisco focused on vector search, AI memory, retrieval infrastructure, and multimodal AI. The event features speakers from major companies including Neo4j, Adobe, Google Deepmind, LlamaIndex, and others, targeting 300+ AI builders.
